description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service. Define a single build stage. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, uses a before_script to log in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, then runs docker build --pull -t \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG\" . and docker push \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG\", and runs on all branches except master. Add a build-master job also in the build stage, with the same before_script, runs only on the master branch, and executes docker build --pull -t \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE\" . and docker push \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE\".
